concerns.text: All Functional Requirements (FR-001, FR-004, FR-005, FR-006, FR-007, FR-008) lack explicit anchoring to a User Story. The spec contains no 'User Scenarios & Testing' section with defined stories (US-NNN) to which these requirements trace. This creates silent under-specification: the implementation has concrete FRs but no defined user goal or story driving them.

Success Criterion SC-004 (Match Rate Threshold) is not anchored to any User Story. There is no corresponding story in the document that defines the user goal of 'verifying track matching rates' or 'handling noisy cue data'.

Edge Cases EC-001, EC-002, and EC-003 describe critical system behaviors (fallback logic, filtering, multicollinearity checks) but are not anchored to any User Story. While often implicit, the requirements coverage lens requires explicit traceability to a story or goal to prevent scope creep or orphaned logic.
